name: Horn of Blasting
description: You can take a Magic action to blow the horn, which emits a thunderous blast in a 30-foot Cone that is audible out to 600 feet.

properties.collateral_damage: Glass or crystal objects in Cone not being worn/carried take 10d8 Thunder damage

destruction_risk.effect: Horn explodes, dealing 10d6 Force damage to user and destroying horn
